note: ANC seat/bag-refund CREATE base: pnr + ticket + EMD (03_emd_issue) + correlation (04_emd_correlation). No FDM/disruption leg (ANC is not a disruption). emd_status I=issued / R=refunded / V=voided / E=exchanged; flow seat|bag toggles the RFISC/serviceType (seat=0B5 PRE RESERVED SEAT ASSIGNMENT, bag=0DF/0C3 CHECKED BAGGAGE) and the DDS array the refund verdict lands in (seatFeeRefundEligibility vs baggageRefundEligibility). See README.md.
